# Jonathan Malkin

> AI builder and solo founder. I build AI systems for communities mainstream tech ignores.

## About

Jonathan Malkin is a solo founder and AI builder based in Austin, Texas. After 20+ years in enterprise technology (presales, solutions engineering, business analysis), he left to build AI-powered tools full-time under Open Door Learning LLC.

His primary work product is Jules, a deeply customized Claude Code system with 116+ configurations (skills, rules, hooks, memory, automated workflows) that runs his entire business. He writes about AI infrastructure, building in underserved markets, and the practical reality of being a solo founder with AI.

## Key Topics

- Claude Code: skills, hooks, rules, CLAUDE.md configuration, subagent orchestration
- AI agents: autonomous workflows, model selection, team-based agent architectures
- Solo founding: one person + AI replacing traditional teams
- Building for underserved communities: taboo-to-mainstream thesis, kink education technology
